metadata.description: A collection of reusable Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Guide for creating effective Claude Code skills with structured methodology, design patterns, and validation tooling

plugins.name: get-youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Fetch transcripts from YouTube videos using youtube-transcript-api

plugins.name: python-code-simplifier
plugins.description: Simplifies and refines Python code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving all functionality

plugins.name: zensical-customizer
plugins.description: Customize and extend Zensical documentation sites with interactive pages, custom templates, JavaScript widgets, and CSS styling

plugins.name: create-cli
plugins.description: Design command-line interface parameters and UX: arguments, flags, subcommands, help text, output formats, error messages, exit codes, prompts, config/env precedence, and safe/dry-run behavior

plugins.name: docs-for-agents
plugins.description: Create and maintain prescriptive reference documentation optimized for AI coding agents — architecture maps, decision dispatch tables, constraints catalogs, and task recipes
